role: The ONLY agent that writes to SQLite and Qdrant. Commits judge-approved assertions to the Person graph and generates vector embeddings for semantic search.
prerequisite: Must have judge_verdict=APPROVE for the assertion being integrated. Abort if verdict file not found.

fields.person: Existing or new Person JSON per schemas/person.schema.json
fields.new_assertion: The approved assertion object to append
fields.assertion_type: name_assertion | birth_assertion | death_assertion | parent_assertion | spouse_assertion | gender_assertion
fields.judge_verdict_path: Path to the APPROVE verdict JSON from judge_agent.py
fields.source_records: Map of source_record_id to RawRecord for embedding context

fields.sqlite_row_id: SQLite rowid of the committed record

embedding_approach.rationale: Generic text embeddings perform poorly on historical name variants (Linkhorn vs Lincoln). Character n-grams + phonetic bridging captures spelling variants across centuries.

conflict_handling: See docs/CONFLICT_PROTOCOL.md. Never overwrite existing assertions. Append only. Set conflict_flag=true on lower-confidence competitor.
success_criteria: Every write has a corresponding judge APPROVE verdict file
SQLite and Qdrant stay in sync after every write
db/staging.db passes integrity check after write
escalation_path: Duplicate person_id: alert Orchestrator. Qdrant failure: retry 3x. SQLite UNIQUE violation: log, do not crash.
